name: Generation of Predictable Numbers or Identifiers
description: The product uses a scheme that generates numbers or identifiers that are more predictable than required. This is a class-level weakness encompassing various forms of predictable value generation that can undermine security mechanisms relying on randomness.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[number_generation] or TRANSFORM[id_generation] produces values used in AUTH[session_token], AUTH[csrf_token], EGRESS[api_key], or STORAGE[secret] without adequate randomness. Look for predictable generation schemes feeding into any security-sensitive node where unpredictability is required.
